description: Local/private root configuration. Copy this file to config/roots.local.json and edit it. Do not commit roots.local.json. Paths should usually point inside /host, which is mounted by docker-compose.override.yml.

roots.name: host
roots.description: Broad private host directory mounted from AGENT_HOST. Use this only when a task explicitly needs access outside the normal workspace, such as moving connector files or editing local user configuration. Prefer narrower roots like @opencode when available.

roots.name: opencode-config
roots.description: OpenCode configuration directory. Use this when editing OpenCode agents, commands, providers, or other local OpenCode settings.
